name: The Gilded Fracture
specialty: Expert navigators of the ever-shifting rifts, their ability to safely traverse the dimensional tears sets them apart from most adventurers in the Undercity.

members.name: Zara Nimblefoot
members.note: A former member of the Iron Fang Consortium, she left with a price on her head for betraying them.

members.name: Elias Shatterstone
members.note: Lost his left arm in a rift accident, replaced with a gleaming obsidian prosthetic that hums softly.

visual: Clad in leather armor, their outfits are adorned with intricate designs made from shards of rift glass. Zara wears a silver, feathered cloak, while Elias carries a large, ornate crossbow. They move with a confident, measured stride, known for their sharp eyes and silent approach.
reputation_note: Rumored to have a map to a hidden stash of rare magical artifacts, The Gilded Fracture is a target for both rival factions and opportunistic adventurers alike.
